Gnosticism is a religious tradition which focuses primarily on escaping [[entrapment]].[[Category:Religions]]
[[sn:Gnosticism]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Gnosticism]][[sn:Gnosticism]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Gnosticism]][[Mani]] was not a gnostic but was in similar spheres. [[Gnosis]] is a goal of gnosticism
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
